name: AVTECH Sweden AB (publ)
summary: AVTECH Sweden AB (publ) develops products and services for digital air traffic management systems worldwide. The company offers Aventus NowCast system that provides aviation weather forecasting; Aventus SIGMA, a weather uplink service, which sends weather alerts directly to the cockpit; and Aventus Air, a solution for sending FMS weather data to aircraft. It serves the air transport industry, including airline operators, airports, air navigation services providers, civil aviation authorities, aircraft manufacturers, and organizations, as well as local or global entities and research organizations. AVTECH Sweden AB (publ) was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.
